title: centaurium × jolivetinum
intro: Centaurium × jolivetinum, also known as Jolivet's centaury, is a hybrid plant species within the Gentianaceae family. It is primarily valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems and respiratory infections, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and soothe irritated tissues. Centaurium × jolivetinum is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, allowing for a convenient and effective way to harness its health benefits.
